requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — OHN / Project Acceptance Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——OHN / 项目验收背景
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——OHN / 項目驗收背景

summary.en: For Honduras solar PV inverter projects, product safety evidence should be checked against OHN-recognised or project-specified standards and the requirements imposed by the owner, installer, insurer, lender, CREE/ENEE reviewer, or local authority. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for power converters and PV inverters. The safety file should identify the exact inverter model or family, ratings, environmental conditions, firmware/hardware configuration, and whether the certificate scope covers the intended Honduras 60 Hz / 120-240 V application.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯太阳能光伏逆变器项目的产品安全证据，应对照OHN认可或项目指定标准，以及业主、安装方、保险方、贷款方、CREE/ENEE审查方或地方主管机关提出的要求进行核验。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率变换器及光伏逆变器的核心国际安全标准。安全文件应说明确切逆变器型号或系列、额定参数、环境条件、固件/硬件配置，以及证书范围是否覆盖拟用于洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V的应用。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯太陽能光伏逆變器項目的產品安全證據，應對照OHN認可或項目指定標準，以及業主、安裝方、保險方、貸款方、CREE/ENEE審查方或地方主管機關提出的要求進行核驗。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率轉換器及光伏逆變器的核心國際安全標準。安全文件應說明確切逆變器型號或系列、額定參數、環境條件、韌體/硬體配置，以及證書範圍是否覆蓋擬用於宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V的應用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
OHN (Organismo Hondureño de Normalización) standards adoption and project-owner acceptance to be confirmed for the specific project

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408 and domestic voluntary certification or test reports. These materials are useful for baseline review but are not the same as an IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificate. A China certificate may also be tied to 50 Hz / 220-380 V default configuration, which needs separate review for Honduras 60 Hz / 120-240 V deployment.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408及国内自愿认证或测试报告。这些材料可用于基准审查，但并不等同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。中国证书也可能绑定50 Hz / 220-380 V默认配置，因此用于洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V部署时须单独审查。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408及國內自願認證或測試報告。這些材料可用於基準審查，但並不等同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。中國證書也可能綁定50 Hz / 220-380 V預設配置，因此用於宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V部署時須單獨審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China GB/T safety or technical-requirements report does not automatically satisfy an IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirement in Honduras. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates for the specific inverter model or family, check whether the issuing laboratory and certification body are acceptable to the buyer and local reviewer, and confirm that any Honduras firmware or grid-code configuration remains within the certified safety scope.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T安全或技术要求报告不能自动满足洪都拉斯IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商应取得或映射特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2证书，确认出具实验室和认证机构是否被买方及本地审查方接受，并确认任何洪都拉斯固件或电网代码配置仍处于已认证安全范围内。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T安全或技術要求報告不能自動滿足宏都拉斯IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商應取得或映射特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2證書，確認出具實驗室和認證機構是否被買方及本地審查方接受，並確認任何宏都拉斯韌體或電網代碼配置仍處於已認證安全範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in buyer, lender, insurer, installer, or interconnection technical files where IEC 62109 is specified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and domestic voluntary certification support China market or procurement review but do not automatically substitute for IEC 62109 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Honduras, treat IEC 62109-1/-2 as the safety evidence package to confirm when a project, buyer, or reviewer requests international PV inverter safety certification. China GB/T evidence can support review but should not be presented as automatic OHN, CREE, ENEE, or project-owner acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对洪都拉斯项目，如项目、买方或审查方要求国际光伏逆变器安全认证，应将IEC 62109-1/-2作为需确认的安全证据包。中国GB/T证据可支持审查，但不应表述为自动获得OHN、CREE、ENEE或项目业主接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對宏都拉斯項目，如項目、買方或審查方要求國際光伏逆變器安全認證，應將IEC 62109-1/-2作為需確認的安全證據包。中國GB/T證據可支持審查，但不應表述為自動獲得OHN、CREE、ENEE或項目業主接受。
